## Outcome

Describe the user-visible or operational result.

## Scope

- [ ] Storefront UI or content
- [ ] Checkout or Stripe boundary
- [ ] Submission or notification API
- [ ] Product or merchant configuration
- [ ] Documentation or operations
- [ ] Dependencies or delivery pipeline

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Relevant focused tests
- [ ] Desktop and 390 px mobile review when UI changed
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] No secrets, invented commercial facts, or unapproved claims

## Launch impact

State whether this changes prices, availability, shipping, policies, analytics, checkout readiness, or environment variables.
